headline: CloudKitchens owner raises $1.7B to automate restaurants and more
summary: The funding for Travis Kalanick's Atoms was led by Andreessen Horowitz and included support from Uber, Kalanick's previous venture.

headline: OpenSearchCon North America 2026 to Showcase Five Years of Innovation Powering Enterprise Search, Observability and Analytics
summary: The OpenSearch Software Foundation, the neutral home for the OpenSearch Project, today announced the schedule for OpenSearchCon North America (NA) 2026, which takes place in San Jose, California from September 22-24. The event will bring together developers, architects, and enterprise leaders to explore how OpenSearch is powering the next generation of AI, search, observability and analytics at enterprise scale.

headline: Serve Robotics to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results, Host Conference Call and Webcast on August 6
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Serve Robotics Inc. (“Serve”) (Nasdaq: SERV), a leading autonomous robotics company, today announced that it will report its 2026 second quarter financial results Thursday, August 6, 2026 after market close. Conference Call and Webcast InformationCompany management will host a conference call at 2 p.m. PT/5 p.m. ET on August 6, 2026 to review the 2026 second quarter financial results. A live audio webcast will be available at investors.serveroboti

headline: Amazon Workers on Food Stamps Nearly Tripled, While Company Spends $200 Billion on AI
summary: A government watchdog report finds a familiar gap widening between what Amazon's workers take home and what its shareholders celebrate, and the company's boldest spending plan yet sits at the center of the tension.

headline: NJ Transit Avoids World Cup Meltdown After Pouring in Millions
summary: (Bloomberg) -- New Jersey Transit, the much-maligned rail system linking the state with New York City, emerged as a surprise winner in this year’s FIFA World Cup. headline: Bill Ackman Says Tesla Robotaxi Fears Are Creating a 'Very Cheap' Buying Opportunity for UBER
summary: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman believes the market’s anxiety over Tesla Inc.‘s upcoming autonomous fleet has severely mispriced Uber Technologies Inc., creating a highly lucrative entry point for investors. Rather than spelling the end for the ride-hailing giant, Ackman argues that...
